notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
**Implementation note:**

There are exactly TWO imports to break in `git/sync.rs`:
```
use crate::daemon::metrics;
use crate::daemon::metrics::MetricsSnapshot;
```

`MetricsSnapshot` is used for reporting sync state. The observer trait needs to cover both the event callbacks AND a way to get/report snapshot data. Either:
1. Add a `fn metrics_snapshot(&self) -> Option<MetricsSnapshot>` to the trait (but that couples the trait to the MetricsSnapshot type)
2. Or move `MetricsSnapshot` to a shared location (beads-daemon already has `metrics.rs` — could put the snapshot type there)

Check exactly what `sync.rs` does with metrics before designing the trait surface.

Also confirmed: `git/sync.rs` is the ONLY file in `git/` that imports from daemon. No other reverse deps.

title: Break git/sync.rs -> daemon::metrics reverse dependency via observer trait
